name: paper-tools
description: Tool-neutral skills for reading and reviewing CV/ML/DL research papers.

interface.longDescription: A tool-neutral paper workflow skill bundle for reading papers and drafting peer-review analysis for computer vision, machine learning, deep learning, and knowledge distillation work. Codex and other compatible CLIs can install or load it.
defaultPrompt: Use $paper-read to read this local paper.
Use $paper-review to review this local paper.
